title: Verify software update flow in guest mode
scenario: Software update flow displays correctly in guest mode with no headset connected, including language change to Spanish and Help Guide page loading
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the welcome screen, select "Continue as guest" (no Poly headset connected).
3. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
4. Change the phone system language to Spanish via device Settings → System → Languages & input → Languages → Add/select Spanish.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the hamburger menu → Support.
6. In the Support menu, tap the "Device" button.
7. Observe the message displayed on screen.
8. Tap the "Help Guide" option and verify the page loads.
expected: The app displays \"No previously connected devices were found\" message when tapping the Device button, and the Help Guide page loads successfully in Spanish (or in the selected language).
